name: Kanjeevaram Bridal Silk
description: A magnificent Kanjeevaram silk saree with intricate gold zari work, perfect for weddings and grand occasions.
careInstructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place.

name: Emerald Green Chiffon
description: Lightweight and flowy georgette saree in a rich emerald green, featuring subtle sequin borders for elegant evening wear.
careInstructions: Hand wash gently with mild detergent.

name: Banarasi Ivory Gold
description: Exquisite Banarasi silk in soft ivory with all-over golden motifs, offering a timeless and regal look.
careInstructions: Dry clean only. Iron on low heat.

name: Midnight Blue Silk Georgette
description: A fusion of silk and georgette with silver embroidery, draping beautifully for an effortlessly chic bridal party look.

name: Classic Golden Mysore Silk
description: Pure Mysore silk known for its minimalistic grace and solid gold sheen, a staple for traditional wardrobes.

name: Sage Pastel Organza Zardosi Saree
description: An elegant sage green organza saree with delicate hand-embroidered Zardosi floral borders, perfect for summer morning weddings and receptions.
careInstructions: Dry clean only. Do not iron directly on embroidery.

name: Pochampally Ikat Silk
description: A striking Pochampally Ikat silk saree with traditional geometric patterns and a solid contrast zari border, handloomed in Telangana.
careInstructions: Dry clean only. Store wrapped in soft muslin cloth.

name: Kashmiri Tilla Crimson Silk
description: Luxurious crepe silk saree featuring exquisite hand-embroidered Kashmiri Tilla work in antique copper and gold metallic threads.
careInstructions: Dry clean only. Delicate zardozi/tilla handling required.

name: Chanderi Cotton Silk Pastel
description: A summer-friendly, light-weight Chanderi cotton-silk saree with elegant silver buttis and a translucent, sheer finish.
careInstructions: Gentle hand wash or dry clean.

name: Patola Double Ikat Heritage
description: An elite Patan Patola double ikat silk saree featuring classic parrot, elephant, and geometric grid motifs, woven to last generations.
careInstructions: Dry clean only. Store flat, do not hang.

name: Gadwal Zari Silk Saree
description: Traditional Gadwal handloom saree featuring a pure cotton body for comfort and a rich teal blue silk border and pallu adorned with fine gold zari work.
careInstructions: Dry clean recommended to maintain silk borders.

name: Bandhani Gota Patti Saree
description: Stunning tie-dyed Rajasthani Bandhani saree in maroon red, featuring hand-embroidered golden Gota Patti border work, ideal for festival nights.
careInstructions: Dry clean only to preserve Gota Patti threadwork.

name: Jamdani Muslin Cotton Saree
description: Ultra-fine hand-woven Jamdani muslin saree featuring delicate gold floral bootis woven directly into the fabric, sheer and elegant summer style.
careInstructions: Dry clean only. Handle with extreme care.

name: Baluchari Heritage Silk Saree
description: Pure Baluchari silk saree from West Bengal, featuring elaborate mythological story scenes woven into the borders and pallu in antique gold zari threads.
careInstructions: Dry clean only. Store in breathable muslin bags.

name: Kalamkari Hand-Painted Saree
description: Hand-painted Tussar silk saree showcasing beautiful traditional Kalamkari mythological stories and floral art in natural vegetable dyes, done by master artists.
careInstructions: Dry clean only. Protect from dampness.
